headline: 13 contracts catalogued on Solana; 6 governance/admin and 7 protocol/pool contracts

findings.text: Official deployed contracts documentation located at https://docs.marinade.finance/developers/contract-addresses with complete address listings for Marinade core program, treasury, validator system, and liquidity pools
Three security audits from 2021 in scope: Neodyme peer review, Ackee Blockchain audit, Kudelski Security assessment; all identified and resolved findings with no critical issues
13 unique addresses discovered and catalogued covering governance multisigs (4/7 Marinade Council), treasury accounts, protocol authorities, and core token/pool contracts
2021 audits reference commit hashes 0176157cda888b0c0b92b22f3178a580032703 (Neodyme) and 0fdd2f0d641dc09ce2d9adc74dbab9d8010c5a09 (Ackee), confirming historical scope

rationale.verdict: Discovery completed via official docs, three audit PDFs, and website content spanning 2021–2023 upgrades. All addresses backed by authoritative sources. Solana chain only (protocol.chains=[Solana]); no cross-chain deployments identified. Total of 13 addresses catalogued with verified roles: 4 governance/admin multisigs, 2 reserve/treasury accounts, 4 core protocol authorities, 3 token/pool contracts.

evidence.shows: Official deployed contracts page listing all Solana addresses including Marinade program (mnspJQyF1KdDEs5c6YJPocYdY1esBgVQFufM2dY9oDk), mSOL mint (mSoLzYCxHdYgdzU16g5QSh3i5K3z3KZK7ytfqcJm7So), governance authorities, treasury accounts, and liquidity pool contracts
2021 Neodyme peer review audit of Marinade on-chain program; commit hash 0176157cda888b0c0b92b22f3178a580032703; no critical/major/medium vulnerabilities found

2021 Ackee Blockchain audit covering /programs/marinade-finance; repository at https://github.com/marinade-finance/marinade-anchor; commit 0fdd2f0d641dc09ce2d9adc74dbab9d8010c5a09; found 1 medium, 1 low, 0 critical issues (all resolved)

2021 Kudelski Security crypto & digital asset assessment; commit 087aeed96a046f7693a553f982fdf95cf77d1845; found 1 medium (validator_vote unchecked in stake_reserve), 1 low (panic-causing calls), 1 informational (outdated dependencies); all status resolved or risk-accepted

Official website confirms Marinade is a Solana liquid staking protocol; references 5 audits (Neodyme 2021, Ackee 2021, Kudelski 2021, plus 2023 upgrades); mentions governance via MNDE token and Marinade DAO

Official documentation home; references deployed_contracts_doc, governance, MNDE token at https://docs.marinade.finance/governance; confirms Marinade Council (4/7 multisig) controls upgrade and admin authority

Centralized audit index; 2024 Neodyme audit of Validator Bonds program; 2023 upgrades audited by Neodyme and Sec3; 2021 audits from Kudelski Security, Ackee Blockchain, and Neodyme code review; confirms all audit links and dates

unknowns: D1-offchain: Solana block explorer name-tag search deferred; Solana does not use name-tag labels like Ethereum/EVM chains; addresses are hex-formatted and identified via official docs instead

D4-offchain: GitHub artifact search for Foundry/hardhat deployment files not performed; Marinade uses Anchor framework on Solana (Rust-based), not Foundry/hardhat; repository at https://github.com/marinade-finance/marinade-anchor but no Foundry broadcast or hardhat-deploy artifacts expected

D6: Factory pattern enumeration deferred; Marinade program (mnspJQyF1KdDEs5c6YJPocYdY1esBgVQFufM2dY9oDk) does not appear to be a factory; validator system, liquidity pool, and stake system are singletons; no child enumeration required

protocol_metadata.about: Marinade is a non-custodial liquid staking protocol on Solana that enables users to stake SOL and receive mSOL—a liquid receipt token accruing staking rewards. The protocol automates validator delegation across 100+ curated validators, supports both native and liquid staking modes, and implements protected staking rewards (PSR) to shield users from validator underperformance. The core program and mSOL token are governed by a 13-party community multisig requiring 6 signatures, with upgrade authority held by Marinade Council (4-of-7 multisig).
